problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: Combining Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
